title: More Cave Sounds
description: This simple mod will randomly play ambient cave sounds to all players in the world in a configurable time frame.
body:
**Description:**


This  mod will randomly play cave sounds in a customisable time frame. It is great for adding extra spookiness to spice up the vanilla experience or for horror mod packs where you want to maximise the fear factor.


**Github:**
https://github.com/flopfleee/MoreCaveSoundsMod
